description: You are a maritime navigation instructor creating a Bridge Command scenario for a 'Meridian Passage' (Noon Sight) exercise on June 15, 2025. Calculate the UTC time of Local Apparent Noon (LAN) and the expected Meridian Altitude for a vessel at 45° 00.0' N, 010° 00.0' W. Create a scenario directory at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/c) Celestial Noon Sight/' and configure 'environment.ini' with the 'Ocean' location, the date June 15, and a StartTime exactly 20 minutes before your calculated LAN. Configure 'ownship.ini' for the vessel 'MV Dorado' at 45° N, 10° W, heading 090, speed 0. Document the calculated UTC time of LAN and the expected Meridian Altitude in an instructor briefing file at '/home/ga/Documents/instructor_briefing.txt'.
